title: Senior Quantity Surveyor (A1 Construction | MNC) DT
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Perform quantity take-offs and reconcile measured quantities against contract documents and subcontractor claims.
  • Manage multiple new build projects or support the measurement, pricing, and evaluation of variation works.
  • Monitor project costs and expenditures, provide regular financial updates to the Project Manager, and assist in the preparation and settlement of final accounts.
  • Administer contracts and coordinate with clients, consultants, subcontractors, and internal site teams to address contractual matters and ensure compliance with scope and contractual obligations.
  • Source, evaluate, and negotiate quotations from subcontractors and suppliers; support procurement activities and issuance of purchase orders in line with approved budgets.
  • Assist in reconciling quantities and assessing the financial impact of site instructions, variations, and change orders.
  • Prepare and submit client progress claims, assess subcontractor claims, certify payments, and support cash flow management.
  • Prepare periodic progress valuations, track variation works, and provide input on project time and cost implications.

Qualifications & Requirements

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Quantity Surveying or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 2–5 years of relevant experience, with senior candidates expected to independently manage multiple projects.
  • Experience with building projects such as residential, commercial, condominiums, or hotels is preferred.
  • Strong knowledge of contract administration, procurement processes, and project financial management.
  • Proficient in quantity surveying software, Microsoft Office, and project management systems.
  • Strong communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.

Attention to: Debbie Tan | 82115165

By submitting any application or résumé to us, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us disclosing your personal information to prospective employers for their consideration.

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

Elitez Pte Ltd | EA Licence: 16C8004| Hailey YANG | Registrations No: R1876431
